fullOutput:
GitHub auto-links in PR body:
  #4 → links to same repo issue/PR #4
  owner/repo#4 → links to cross-repo issue/PR #4
  **Closes owner/repo#4** → bold text, reference still auto-links
  [text](url) → explicit markdown link

Keyword behavior in PR body text (NOT in commit messages):
  GitHub only processes close keywords in PR body when PR is merged
  The keywords in PR body don't auto-close on their own in body text
  For display purposes they're just text with auto-linked references
